generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign allies for critical defense tech? That's a risk we can't afford. Our own strategic autonomy isn't just about pride—it's about ensuring our safety when crises hit. Look at the recent supply chain disruptions; we can't let vital systems depend on unstable partners. Investing in homegrown solutions protects our families and communities. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongerTogether
